3ybk192TPB.fact: All imports must be at the top of the file (no indented imports). Move inline imports to module level.

8qL2mP9kNx.fact: Fact creation must auto-relocate to appropriate folder based on common parent of incl patterns

DaEC5FQP2v.fact: Keep terms distinct: "matcher" = prefixed string (g:…, r:…). "glob_pattern" = raw value after prefix (**/*.py). Use "glob_pattern" not bare "pattern" for unprefixed glob values.

GyiB7V5gBI.fact: `__init__.py` files should be empty, they are for defining packages only

HnxA2azN7L.fact: Python files are named after main function they contain.

QV4GQDuHhq.fact: Use underscore prefix for internal helpers, not classes.

Z6bD5rHuaK.fact: Tests and lints are run with one command `make test`

ZQofChpw84.fact: Storage boundary: .lore.json stores matchers relative to its directory (local). merge_fact_tree_to_global_matchers converts to project-root-relative (global). All code outside lore/store/ must use global matchers. CRUD ops return global matchers.

otH1mpeZiP.fact: Glob patterns are directory-relative. merge_fact_tree_to_global_matchers globalizes at load; create_fact relativizes at write. Preserve this round-trip.

pGvwDm9XJa.fact: Ensure this file semantically belongs in its folder — the namespace should reflect its purpose, not just mechanical grouping.

yk0NpgX8iR.fact: Function name should start with a verb. Predicates can start with 'is_', 'has_', 'can_' etc.
